title: Incident Mapping Record
description: Defines an audit log entry mapping actual AI operational failures or vulnerabilities directly to targeted defensive controls.

id.description: Unique identifier of the incident mapping entry (e.g. map_1234).

incident_id.description: Reference identifier of the incident case file (e.g. inc_1234).

ai_system_id.description: Identifier of the AI system affected (references sys_1234).

failed_control_ids.description: List of system controls that failed or were bypassed during the event (references ctl_1234).

impact_summary.description: Brief description of system damage, data exposure, or biased outputs.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the incident event mapping was recorded.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for metadata extensions.
